zh.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh.Brereton, Cheshire, England,: 英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: William of Brereton是Sir Ralph De Brereton II和Ada de Hastings的兒子，於大約1244年出生在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可。他於1263年之前與Cicelie Sandbach在英國英格蘭爾桑德巴賀結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1299年11月19日在英國爾桑德巴賀享年56歲。

zh-hans.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh-hans.Brereton, Cheshire, England,: 英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William of Brereton是Sir Ralph De Brereton II和Ada de Hastings的儿子，于大约1244年出生在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可。他于1263年之前与Cicelie Sandbach在英国英格兰爾桑德巴賀结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1299年11月19日在英国爾桑德巴賀享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: William of Brereton was born about 1244, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England as the son of Sir Ralph De Brereton II and Ada de Hastings. He married Cicelie Sandbach before 1263, in Sandbach, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 November 1299, in Sandbach, Cheshire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: William of Brereton est né environ 1244, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Ralph De Brereton II et Ada de Hastings. Il a épousé Cicelie Sandbach avant 1263, à Sandbach, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1299, à Sandbach, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William of Brereton wurde um 1244 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Ralph De Brereton II und Ada de Hastings geboren. Er hat vor 1263 in Sandbach, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Cicelie Sandbach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. November 1299 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Sandbach, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: William of Brereton è nato il circa 1244 nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England come figlio di Sir Ralph De Brereton II e Ada de Hastings. Lui sposato Cicelie Sandbach prima del 1263, nel Sandbach, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 novembre 1299, nel Sandbach, Cheshire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: イギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィック
ja.Brereton, Cheshire, England,: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン
ja.Sandbach, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアサンドバチ
ja.lifeSummary: William of Breretonは約1244年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックでSir Ralph De Brereton IIとAda de Hastingsの息子として生まれた。1263年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアサンドバチでCicelie Sandbachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1299年11月19日にイギリスチェシュアイアサンドバチで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William of Brereton(은)는 대략 1244년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 쿠 스멧h윅에서 Sir Ralph De Brereton II(와)과 Ada de Hastings의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1263년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 샌드바치에서 Cicelie Sandbach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 11월 19일 영국 체실르 샌드바치에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Brereton, Cheshire, England,: Brereton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: William of Brereton nasceu aproximadamente 1244, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Ralph De Brereton II e Ada de Hastings. Ele casou-se com Cicelie Sandbach antes 1263, em Sandbach, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1299, em Sandbach, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William of Brereton родился около 1244 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Ralph De Brereton II и Ada de Hastings. Он женился на женщине по имени Cicelie Sandbach перед 1263 г. в местности сэндбач, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 ноября 1299 г. в местности сэндбач, чешир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William of Brereton nació aproximadamente 1244, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Ralph De Brereton II y Ada de Hastings. Se casó con Cicelie Sandbach antes de 1263, en Sandbach, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1299, en Sandbach, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
